hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day for fresh starts. Harness your energy to tackle new challenges ahead.
aries.love: Emotional sparks may fly, but communication is key to harmony.
aries.career: Your creativity will be your biggest asset in solving work-related issues today.

taurus.general: Stability is your anchor today. Hold tight to what matters most.
taurus.love: Patience and understanding will deepen your romantic connections.
taurus.career: Trust your instincts in decision-making; they will guide you to success.

gemini.general: Flexibility is your strength today. Adaptability will lead you to unexpected opportunities.
gemini.love: A heart-to-heart conversation can strengthen your bond with someone special.
gemini.career: Network and socialize; your connections could lead to exciting professional ventures.

cancer.general: Home and family take center stage today. Nurture those relationships.
cancer.love: A romantic gesture will show your partner how much you care.
cancer.career: Collaboration with colleagues will yield positive results; seek their insights.

leo.general: Your charisma shines bright today; use it to inspire others.
leo.love: Express your feelings openly; honesty will strengthen your relationships.
leo.career: Your leadership skills may be tested, but trust in your abilities.

virgo.general: Focus on details today; your meticulous nature will pay off.
virgo.love: Offering support to a loved one will enhance the bond you share.
virgo.career: Organizational skills will lead to breakthroughs in your projects.

libra.general: Balance is key; find harmony between work and personal life.
libra.love: Romantic plans are in the stars; make time for that special someone.

scorpio.general: Your passion is your driving force; use it to fuel your ambitions.
scorpio.love: A deep conversation can strengthen emotional bonds with partners.
scorpio.career: Today, a new opportunity may be just around the corner; stay alert.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; step out of your comfort zone and explore.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity can ignite flames in romantic pursuits today.
sagittarius.career: Embrace new challenges; they may lead to significant growth.

capricorn.general: Long-term planning becomes essential; lay the groundwork for future success.
capricorn.love: Take a more practical approach to love; actions speak louder than words.
capricorn.career: Your hard work will begin to pay off; stay committed.

aquarius.general: Innovation is your ally today; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Open-mindedness will lead to enriching experiences in love.
aquarius.career: Your unique ideas will be recognized; don’t hesitate to share them.

pisces.general: Trust your intuition; it will guide you through any uncertainties.
pisces.love: A creative date can rekindle romance and excitement.
pisces.career: Artistic pursuits may open new doors for you in your profession.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
professional.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
professional.author: Wayne Gretzky

professional.text: It's not about ideas. It's about making ideas happen.
professional.author: Scott Belsky

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Every day may not be good, but there's something good in every day.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions.
captions.author: Dalai Lama

captions.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
captions.author: Albert Einstein

captions.text: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
captions.author: Charles R. Swindoll

captions.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
captions.author: Walt Whitman

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change—technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The biggest innovations of the 21st century will be at the intersection of biology and technology.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The most important thing for technology is to ensure daily enjoyment.
tech.author: Jaron Lanier

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: If you’re not having fun, you’re doing it wrong.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

fun.text: We don’t stop playing because we grow old; we grow old because we stop playing.
fun.author: George Bernard Shaw

fun.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
fun.author: Mae West

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith is not believing that God can; it's knowing that He will.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: The miracle is not that we do this work, but that we are happy to do it.
faith.author: Mother Teresa

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is hope.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the assurance of things hoped for, the conviction of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, you must first learn humility.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: St. Augustine

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
